products.name: Auriga Racing Elite Inline Skate Boots (Silver)
products.short_description: Auriga Racing Elite Inline Skate Boots are a class apart from others. Made with 100% carbon fiber specially outsourced from one of the finest producers of carbon fiber in Japan.
products.description:
Auriga Racing Elite Inline Skate Boots are designed in India and produced by some of the finest leather craftsmen, purely handmade with love using the finest Japanese Carbon Fiber layered unilaterally and microfiber leather upper bonded with the genuine leather.

The Boot Shell: Auriga Racing Elite boots are made with 100% carbon fiber and are fully heat moldable. A custom like snug fit ensures that each and every stroke delivers the maximum power to your skates towards the finish line and ultimately to the podium and glory.

Carbon Fiber: Auriga Racing boots are made from high strength Carbon fiber specially sourced from one of the world's top carbon fiber manufacturers in Japan. The layers of carbon fiber are laid down unilaterally giving the maximum utilization of fiber to get strength from it using special kind of resins.

The Toe Box: The toe box is designed with ample room ensuring comfort during long skating sessions while maintaining structural integrity.

Heat Moldability: Fully heat moldable for a custom fit around heel and ankle area.

products.short_description: Auriga Racing Inferno Inline Skate Boots (White & Blue) boots are a class apart from others. Made with the finest carbon fiber specially outsourced from Japan.
products.description:
Auriga Racing Inferno Inline Skate Boots (White & Blue)

The Boot Shell: We have designed a completely new boot shell made of Carbon fiber specially outsourced from Japan. The shell is designed separately for Indian, South Asian and European skaters as the anatomy of their feet are different hence a separate shoe last to be designed and developed after analyzing the collected feet data from different parts of global regions. Result is a custom like snug fit in every pair of Auriga stock boots.

Carbon Fiber: Auriga Racing boots are made from high strength Carbon fiber specially sourced from one of the world's top carbon fiber manufacturers in Japan.

products.name: Auriga Racing OCCULT 4X110 Inline Skate Frames (Grey)
products.short_description: Auriga Racing OCCULT frames are solid frames, specially designed and engineered for exceptional performance in intense high-speed racing. Weighing merely 175g.
products.description:
Auriga Racing OCCULT 4X110 Grey Inline Skate Frames

Auriga Racing OCCULT frames are solid frames, specially designed and engineered for exceptional performance in intense high-speed racing. These frames are ultra-light weight yet possess exceptional stiffness. OCCULT frames are a class apart from its adversaries, weighing merely 175g.

These frames are carved out in one piece from a single block of AL7075 and then tempered at T6 level. The T6 temper is usually achieved by homogenizing the cast 7075 at 450C for several hours, quenching and then ageing at 120C for several hours. This yields the peak strength of 7075 alloy. And finally, they are CNC machined to perfection.

The OCCULT frames have a 4x110mm wheel setup. They are best suitable for a versatile all-round skater and supports long distance events like a marathon, 10k or 15k Point or Elimination race.

products.short_description: Auriga Racing TENET frames are solid frames, specially engineered for exceptional performance in intense high-speed racing. Weighing merely 164g.
products.description:
Auriga Racing TENET HiLo 3x110 + 1x100 (Grey) Inline Skate Frames

Auriga Racing TENET frames are solid frames, specially engineered for exceptional performance in intense high-speed racing. These frames are ultra-light weight yet possess exceptional stiffness. TENET frames weigh merely 164g.

The TENET frames have a HiLo 3x110 - 1x100 wheel setup. They are best suitable for a versatile all-round skater to sprint skaters both for events like 200 meters dual time trial to 500 meters to 10k point or elimination events.

products.name: Auriga Racing QUANTUM 4x100mm Inline Skate Frames
products.short_description: Auriga Racing QUANTUM 4x100mm Inline Skate Frames offer the optimum level of stiffness with right amount of flex.
products.description:
Auriga Racing QUANTUM 4x100mm Inline Skate Frames are extrusion frames made from special grade aircraft aluminum. The extrusion profile gets heat treated to T6 temper to achieve its maximum strength, artificially aged before going for CNC machining process.

Every design of QUANTUM series frames undergoes computerized stress test stimulation to check that every part, cut out, and every curve of the frame is strong enough to handle the pressure in high-speed racing especially on the corners.

products.name: Auriga Racing CTR22 4x84 & 3x100 Inline Skate Frames (Black)
products.short_description: Designed for cadet group skaters to take them to next level of speed skating. These frames are highly responsive and light in weight.
products.description:
Auriga Racing CTR22 (Black) 4x84 & 3x100 Inline Skate Frames

Designed especially for cadet group skaters to take them to next level of speed skating by understanding their specific requirements. These frames are highly responsive, easily maneuverable and light in weight.

This speed skate frame offers 4x84mm and 3x100mm race setups just by changing the size of the wheels. No need to replace the frame.

products.name: Hydrogen Pro Inline Skate Wheels 110mm XXF (8pcs)
products.short_description: Hydrogen Pro wheels are made in the USA with the highest quality materials for all race conditions.
products.description:
Hydrogen Pro Inline Skate Wheels 110mm XXF (8pcs)

Hydrogen Pro wheels are made in the USA with the highest quality materials, standards and attention to details to be used during all race conditions and leisure skates for consistent, top-end performance on road, track, long distance and sprints.

Provides the extra speed required for athletic competitions. excellent, consistent performance, superior control in turns, great speed all track/speed competitions.

They incorporate a multi-layer technology, Mtech, which is comprised of two layers of urethane to provide the ultimate footprint (for grip), rebound (speed/energy return), roll and wear.

Features:
- ELITE PERFORMANCE - Hydrogen Pro 110mm wheels provide advanced speed with excellent wear and efficiency
- EXCLUSIVE DUAL POUR FORMULA with M-TECH - Inner ring is softer for flex, outer ring is firmer for speed
- 9-SPOKED TURBINE CORE helps keep the straight-line speed with vibration reduction

products.name: Hydrogen Pro Inline Skate Wheels 110mm XF (8pcs)
products.short_description: Hydrogen Pro wheels are made in the USA with the highest quality materials for all race conditions.

products.name: Sigma-II With Visor (Black)
products.short_description: The Sigma-II features our race-proven magnetic lens attachment system that allows for quick attaching and removal of a wrap-around eye shield.
products.description:
Our new performance cycling helmet is so compact, light & comfortable you forget you actually have one on!

The Sigma-II features our race-proven magnetic lens attachment system that allows for quick attaching and removal of a wrap-around eye shield. Our system allows easy storage of the lens in the "flipped up" position - perfect for fast transitions in triathlon.

The new 'hidden' magnetic receivers on the helmet are fully compatible with SKY or A2 lenses.

3 Reasons to wear a Cadomotus Sigma-II helmet:
1. Sigma-II follows the latest trends in helmet design; with a robust compact shape and aerodynamic geometry.
2. Sigma-II keeps your head cool thanks to extra-large ventilation channels, even in the highest temperatures
3. Sigma-II allows you to use a full-face aerodynamic visor, great for triathletes or cyclist wearing prescription eyeglasses
